calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kiu Fai Wong and wife/Ke Lan Wong, Respondents/Plaintiffs with daughter/Shirley Wong
Yu Tong Wu and wife/Bing Yan Chen Appellants/Defendants

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. The parties were sworn and both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.
The Court rules from the bench in favor of the Respondent/Plaintiff and against the Appellant/Defendant. Principal payment of $3,277.00.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott A. Myles; Clerk: Leelay Chin; not reported (D. 525)
